trigger: ScanType == "Sequential Scan" AND Rows > 10000
WHERE clause uses LOWER(), UPPER(), or DATE() on indexed col
JoinType == "Nested Loop" where Inner Side is a large Seq Scan
action: SET enable_nestloop = off; -- Or suggest Hash Join optimization

trigger: Heavy IN or EXISTS causing execution bottlenecks
action: Rewrite to INNER JOIN or LEFT JOIN for parallel execution.

trigger: EXPLAIN discrepancy > 50% between Estimated vs Actual rows
idx_scan == 0 AND idx_updates > 10000
bloat_pct > 30% (calculated via pgstattuple)
pg_locks showing granted = false for > 10 seconds
state == 'idle in transaction' for > 5 minutes
age(relfrozenxid) > 150,000,000
n_dead_tup > 20% of total tuples AND Size > 1GB
active_connections > 85% of max_connections
action: Alert: "Scale Connections" / ALTER SYSTEM SET max_connections...

trigger: ALTER TABLE detected without lock_timeout
replay_lag > 100MB in pg_stat_replication
action: Alert: "Throttle Batch Jobs" to allow replica catch-up.

trigger: Cache Hit Ratio < 95%
query_duration > 30s
temp_files > 0 in pg_stat_database (Work-mem spill)
action: SET work_mem = '64MB'; -- Adjust for specific session

trigger: Small queries using JIT leading to high compile time
action: SET jit = off; -- For low-latency transactional queries

trigger: External Merge detected in EXPLAIN Analyze
High volume of JOIN on columns without Index
Full Text Search LIKE %word% on large text
action: CREATE EXTENSION pg_trgm; CREATE INDEX ON [t] USING GIN...

trigger: Multiple references to same CTE causing slow-down
action: WITH name AS MATERIALIZED (...) -- Force cache in PG12+

trigger: autovacuum_count high but bloat remains
wait_event_type == 'Lock' high in pg_stat_activity
Checkpoints occurring too frequently in logs
Table size > 100GB AND queries use date-based filtering.
Parallel Workers used in EXPLAIN < max_parallel_workers_per_gather.
wait_event == 'SSLKeyAssignment' or high connection handshake time.
action: Suggest: Use a connection pooler (pgBouncer) with SSL pre-established.

trigger: Multiple sessions waiting on RowExclusiveLock.
action: Batch UPDATE statements to reduce lock frequency.

trigger: High read latency on tables with large TEXT/BYTEA columns.
Queries failing on Replica due to "conflict with recovery."
High IO spikes during checkpoints in pg_stat_bgwriter.
action: Check wal_compression status; set to ON.

trigger: INSERT speed slow due to multiple Foreign Key validations.
action: Disable constraints during bulk load: SET session_replication_role = 'replica';

trigger: Deeply nested JSONB queries causing CPU spikes.
action: CREATE INDEX idx_gin ON [t] USING GIN ([json_col] jsonb_path_ops);

trigger: nextval exhaustion (Integer vs BigInt).
action: ALTER TABLE [t] ALTER COLUMN [id] TYPE BIGINT;

trigger: last_failed_wal present in pg_stat_archiver.
action: Alert: "Disk Full or Network Issue on Archive Path."

trigger: work_mem * active_queries > 80% of Available RAM.
pg_catalog tables (like pg_attribute) showing high bloat.
Large table, physically sorted by time, B-Tree is too large.
action: CREATE INDEX idx_brin ON [t] USING BRIN ([timestamp]);

trigger: Visibility Map issues leading to slow index-only scans.
High planning_time vs execution_time for repeated queries.
pg_cursors showing old open cursors not being closed.
Slow queries using ANY(ARRAY[...]) on unindexed columns.
action: CREATE INDEX idx_arr ON [t] USING GIN ([array_col]);

trigger: Autovacuum workers constantly interrupted by user DDL.
pg_hint_plan used to force Join order (Risk of plan drift).
action: Alert: "Manual Plan Hint detected—Review for staleness."

trigger: Subqueries in JOIN not filtering early enough.
action: Move WHERE clause inside the CTE or Subquery.

trigger: High System CPU usage (Kernel management of memory).
action: Suggest: Enable huge_pages = try in postgresql.conf.

trigger: Table has high n_dead_tup but autovacuum is disabled.
INSERT/UPDATE to sensitive tables without logging.
action: Trigger ActionEngine to log audit proof to MongoDB.
